name: gw-user-mgmt-l1-api-tests
description: Layer 1 API Testing for User Management Service (gw-user-mgmt-svc)

scripts.test:happy: newman run OS2-User-Mgmt-L1-API-Tests.postman_collection.json --environment env.dev.json --folder 'L1.1 — Happy Path (14 Endpoints)' --reporters cli,json,html
scripts.test:errors: newman run OS2-User-Mgmt-L1-API-Tests.postman_collection.json --environment env.dev.json --folder 'L1.2 — Error Cases (Boundary Tests)' --reporters cli,json,html
scripts.test:idempotency: newman run OS2-User-Mgmt-L1-API-Tests.postman_collection.json --environment env.dev.json --folder 'L1.3 — Idempotency Tests' --reporters cli,json,html

author: Wincasty Kariuki (QA Engineering)
